title: dontAsk mode + allow Write(*) -> pre-approved writes go through; read-only tools are unaffected

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P1-permission-mode/g-dontAsk-with-allow/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
Use the Read tool to read the file $REPO/cases/P1-permission-mode/g-dontAsk-with-allow/sentinel.txt and output its exact contents. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain.

hypothesis: dontAsk auto-denies only what would otherwise ASK. (1) A pre-approved tool (allow Write(*)) never reaches ask, so it goes through even in dontAsk — this is the positive control for the CI recipe 'enumerate allow + dontAsk' (P1-d is the negative half). (2) Read-only tools (Read) sit in the no-approval tier, never ask, and are therefore unaffected by dontAsk — 'Auto-denies tools unless pre-approved' in the docs scopes to tools that would prompt.
